page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: GSAlign: an ultra-fast sequence alignment tool
page_metadata.biotools__summary:
An efficient sequence alignment tool for intra-species genomes.

GSAlign: an ultra-fast sequence alignment algorithm for intra-species genome comparison.

Developers: Dr. Hsin-Nan Lin and Dr. Wen-Lian Hsu Institute of Information Science, Academia Sinica, Taiwan.

Personal genomics and comparative genomics are two fields that are more and more important in clinical practices and genome researches.
